topic: ALL stock Dec 24 vs Dec 27 comparison
summary: Question effectively compares Dec 26 close to Dec 24 close (Dec 27 is Saturday). Base rate ~52%, slight Santa Claus Rally boost. Recent momentum positive.
content: Dec 24 early close at 1PM EST. Dec 25 closed. Dec 26 normal. Dec 27 Saturday = uses Dec 26 close. Stock has been recovering from $200.87 (Dec 8) to $209.55 (Dec 23). Single-day comparison essentially. Base rate stocks up on any day ~52-53%. Santa Claus Rally adds marginal positive bias. Holiday trading volumes are low which can increase noise but doesn't change direction bias.
